House Visit.name: House Visit
House Visit.description: Practice short, polite social visits with practical conversations
House Visit.objective: Complete a polite and efficient home visit with the senior.
instructions: Stay focused on the purpose of the visit
guidance: Stay focused on the purpose of the visit
House Visit.turn_end_message: Thanks for checking in, I am going to rest now.

Emotional Listening Ear.name: Listening Ear
Emotional Listening Ear.description: Learn to provide emotional support and validation
Emotional Listening Ear.objective: Help the senior feel heard and emotionally supported.
Emotional Listening Ear.turn_end_message: I am feeling tired now, thank you for listening.

Resolve a Task.name: Resolve a Task
Resolve a Task.description: Practice helping seniors complete practical tasks with patience
Resolve a Task.objective: Help the senior complete a specific task successfully.
Resolve a Task.turn_end_message: Thanks for checking in, I am going to rest now.
